item_a_summary_snippet: Tools give your Custom Agents capabilities that Notion and MCP don’t cover on their own. Write your logic in code and deploy it as a Worker. You get composable workflows with typed I/O, repeatable runs, and logged execution. It's deterministic, so it's more reliable than LLM reasoning, and a fraction of the token cost. Use them to generate assets, query internal data, or take action in any other app. Read the docs → developers.notion.com/workers/guides… 💬 1 🔄 2 ❤️ 19 👀 4242 📊 4 ⚡ Powered by xgo.
